title: goal state.json v2
description: Schema for .goal/state.json — the single source of truth for an active /goal session. Validated on every write in the MCP server (hand-rolled; this file is documentation + future tooling reference).

schema_version.description: Always 2 for v2 state files. Readers must reject files with other values.

goal_id.description: RFC 4122 UUID v4 (lowercase). Rotated on create/replace. CAS guard key.

objective.description: User-provided objective text. Treat as untrusted data in prompts.

status.description: Lifecycle state. 'relaying' and 'queued' are runtime-driven and auto-resume. 'paused', 'needs-input', 'budget-limited' never auto-resume. Model can only set 'achieved' via update_goal.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the goal was created. Format: 2006-01-02T15:04:05Z

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent write. Updated on every state change.

token_budget.description: Optional positive token budget. null = unlimited. When tokens_used >= token_budget, status transitions to budget-limited.

tokens_used.description: Cumulative tokens this goal has consumed: fresh input + cache-write + output, summed per turn via monotonic delta accounting (cache reads excluded). Maintained only by the Stop hook.

time_used_seconds.description: Baseline elapsed seconds. Consumers add live delta from observed_at/active_turn_started_at while pursuing.

active_turn_started_at.description: Timestamp for the current active turn; null outside active pursuit.

tokens_used_observed_at.description: Timestamp for the last trustworthy token observation.

time_used_seconds_final.description: Terminal elapsed-time snapshot. Renderers never recompute live time after this is set.

tokens_used_final.description: Terminal token snapshot. Renderers never recompute after this is set.

cost_usd.description: Cumulative notional API cost of this goal in USD. Summed per turn from Claude Code's own per-turn costUSD (cache- and model-aware); the plugin maintains no price table. For subscription users this is an API-equivalent estimate, not a bill. 0 when costUSD is unavailable.

cost_usd_final.description: Terminal cost snapshot, frozen when the goal reaches achieved or budget-limited.

accounting.description: Stop-hook delta-accounting baseline. Stores the last cumulative transcript totals (last_tokens, last_cost) and the transcript path they were read from, written atomically with tokens_used/cost_usd so the baseline can never drift from the counters. Internal; not user-edited.

tick_count.description: Number of Stop-hook continuation ticks fired for this goal.

pursuing_seconds.description: Cumulative active pursuit seconds, excluding paused intervals.

pursuing_since.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the start of the current pursuing session. Non-null only when status === 'pursuing'.

history.description: Append-only log of state transitions and notable events.

compat.description: Agent runner IDs that can participate in this goal. Single-agent goals have ['claude-code'] only.

roles.description: Role assignments for cowork mode. null or all-null values = single-agent mode.

current.description: Which agent is currently active. null = solo or no active agent.

budget.description: Structured budget configuration. null = use token_budget field.

lineage.description: Per-agent session records. lineage[0] is synthesized at migration time. New entries are appended when a new agent picks up the goal.

model.description: Model identifier at time of session. 'unknown' when not available at migration time.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this agent's session began.

ended_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this agent's session ended. null if still active.

turns.description: Number of continuation turns for this agent session.

tokens.description: Tokens consumed by this agent session.

summary.description: Human-readable note about what this agent session did. 'migrated from v1' for the synthetic lineage[0].

handoff_head.description: Sequence number of the most recent handoff envelope. null until first handoff.

queued_until.description: ISO-8601 timestamp until which the goal is queued. null unless status === 'queued'.
